title: GH #27.5: judge FAIL verdict blocks cap (audited override only)
action: Per D-GHF-C: capCell (~:700-833) gains a guard analogous to the verify_passed guard (~:726-730): read the LATEST trace.semantic_judge entry; when its verdict === 'NEEDS_REVISION' (judge.mjs:16 JUDGE_VERDICTS=['PASS','NEEDS_REVISION'] — the verdict enum has NO 'FAIL'; CHECK_STATUSES is a different per-check field), refuse by THROWING an Error carrying code JUDGE_REWORK_REQUIRED (capCell's existing failure pattern is throw, e.g. :726-730) with a fix hint (rework then judge-record a PASS, or cap --override-judge "<reason>"). New cap flag --override-judge <reason>: appends {overridden_at, reason, last_verdict} to append-only trace.judge_overrides and logs a decision; only then cap proceeds. Cells with NO semantic_judge entries cap exactly as today. Wire the flag through handleCellsCap + cells.cap registry parameters (override-judge). Tests: cap refused after NEEDS_REVISION judge-record; override caps + audits; no-judge cells unchanged. Run onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply. Commit: fix(judge): NEEDS_REVISION verdict blocks cap without audited override (GH #27) [ghf-6].

truths: FAIL latest verdict => cap refused without override
cells without judge entries byte-identical behavior
prohibitions: never auto-reopen the cell (lifecycle verb is 1.7.3 roadmap)

trace.outcome: capCell now refuses cap on a NEEDS_REVISION semantic-judge verdict (typed JUDGE_REWORK_REQUIRED) unless an audited --override-judge reason is supplied; override appends to trace.judge_overrides and logs a decision
trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence":"Pre-fix, capCell(root, id, {files_changed, outcome}) SUCCEEDED and returned status:\"capped\" even when the cell's latest trace.semantic_judge entry had verdict NEEDS_REVISION -- confirmed via a throwaway repro script that added a cell, recorded a NEEDS_REVISION verdict via recordJudgeVerdict, claimed it, recorded a passing verify, then called capCell with no override option; it printed RED CONFIRMED: capCell SUCCEEDED despite NEEDS_REVISION verdict -- status: capped. Post-fix the same sequence throws a typed JUDGE_REWORK_REQUIRED error and the cell stays uncapped unless --override-judge/overrideJudge is supplied.","tests_added":"3 new checks in test_lib.mjs (capCell refuses NEEDS_REVISION with typed JUDGE_REWORK_REQUIRED; --override-judge caps + audits trace.judge_overrides + logs a decision; PASS verdict and no-judge-entries cells cap unchanged), 1 new CLI-level check in test_bee_cli.mjs exercising cells cap --override-judge end to end through the real dispatcher.","verification_run":"node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs -- 409+212+4 pass, 0 fail, combined exit 0"}
trace.verify_output: test_lib.mjs 409/409 pass (3 new judge-override cases), test_bee_cli.mjs 212/212 pass (1 new CLI case), test_lib_mirror.mjs 4/4 pass; combined exit 0

checks.evidence: cells.mjs:~786 latest semantic_judge NEEDS_REVISION && !override -> throw JUDGE_REWORK_REQUIRED; judge.mjs:16 confirms enum
empty judgeEntries -> guard skipped; only latest entry consulted
override appends judge_overrides entry + logDecision before writeCell cells.mjs:~800-820
no status reopen; goal-check dispatch untouched
handleCellsCap threads override-judge; registry param added; test_bee_cli 212/0 incl e2e override case
